questions.question: What does EDA stand for in data science?
questions.hint: Think about what analysts do before building a model — they examine and explore the data to understand what's in it.

questions.question: Which chart type is best suited for showing the distribution of a single numeric variable?
questions.hint: Recall which visualization groups values into bins to show how often each range of values appears.

questions.question: What is feature scaling used for in machine learning?
options: Adding more rows to the dataset
Ensuring numeric features are on a comparable scale
questions.hint: Think about what happens when one feature is measured in thousands and another in single digits — scaling brings them onto the same playing field.

questions.question: Which technique replaces missing values with the column mean?
questions.hint: The name of this technique hints at the statistic being used to fill in the gaps.
